---
title: Short Articles
author: Walter Dal'Maz Silva
date: today
format:
  html:
    css: _assets/index.css
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    margin-left: auto
    margin-right: auto
    max-width: 960px
---

## General

- [What about Scientific Computing?](shorts/scientific-computing.html)

## Transport and Kinetics

- [A Chemical Plant MPC]shorts/chemical-plant-mpc.html)
- [Steady-state heat transfer](shorts/julia-steady-conduction.html)

## Data Science and Machine Learning

- [How Many More Points?](shorts/recursive-mean.html)
- [How will I finish?](shorts/how-will-i-finish.html)
<!-- - [Physics and Neural Nets](physics-and-neural-nets.html) -->
